message:
Parse IVF partition offsets/lengths for accurate ANN search

- Add _findIVFMessage() to recursively parse IVF protobuf structure
- Parse field 2 (offsets) as packed uint64 - byte offsets for each partition
- Parse field 3 (lengths) as packed uint32/varint - row count per partition
- Update _vectorSearchWithIndex() to use actual partition boundaries
- Falls back to even distribution if partition info not available

This enables accurate partition-based vector search when index contains
partition metadata, rather than estimating boundaries.
